sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5585" key="a)mukte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμυκτέον</orth>, <sense id="n5585.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must scarify,</tr_> Menem. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:7:22:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.22.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg006:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
